title: Severability
doc_html:
§1300.79. Severability

            If one or more provisions of this Part or the application thereof is found to be unconstitutional, the provision shall be declared severable, and the balance of this Part shall remain effective notwithstanding such unconstitutionality.

            Acts 2024, No. 750, §1.
doc_text:
§1300.79.  Severability
If one or more provisions of this Part or the application thereof is found to be
unconstitutional, the provision shall be declared severable, and the balance of this Part shall
remain effective notwithstanding such unconstitutionality.
Acts 2024, No. 750, §1.
